titleStmt.title: SII 26.495: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 495. (A.R. No. 471 of 1909.) ĀḺVĀR-TIRUNAGARI, TIRUCHENDUR TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is another copy of the same detailed under No. 493 above. Here, however, a long list of signatories is given at the end.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiripuvaṉaccakkaravatti konermaikoṇṭāṉ tiruvaḻuti vaḷanāṭṭu tirukkurukūr poliñcu niṉṟaruḷiya [ paramasavāmika]
ḷ koyil tiruppati śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷukku vaṭatalai cempināṭṭu kiḻaik koṭumaḷūrāṉa maturotaiyanallūr Arayaṉ pūvaṇāṉa veṇā
ṭuṭaiyār Araiyaṉ tirunāṭuṭaiyāṉāṉa nilakaṅkaraiyar peyarāṟ kaṇṭa tirunāṭuṭaiyāṉ cantikku tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nimantaṅkaḷu
kku Ivveṇāṭuṭaiyār piṟanta Uttiraṭṭāti nāḷ tirttham prasātippatāka kaṇṭa cittiraitirunāḷ patiañcukkum tiruppaṭi māṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇ
ṭum nivantaṅkaḷukkum tirunāḷpaṭikkum Ināṭṭu peruṅkuḷamāṉa Uttamapāṇṭiyanallūril Ipparamasvāmikaḷukku tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili
yāy Ivveṇuṭuṭaiyārk kāṇiyāṉa nilam Añcu veliyil tiruveḷḷaṟai niṉṟa Ātippirāṉ vaṇṭuvaraipperumāṉāṉa cuntarapāṇṭi
ya brahmātarāyaṉukku Ivveṇāṭuṭaiyāṉ kārāṇmai taṉmatāṉamāka kuṭutta nilam Araiyum nikki nilam nālaraiyum muṉṉuṭaiyārai
tavirttu 10 1 ruvatiṉetirāmāṇṭu mutal kārāṇmai miyāṭci tevatāṉamāka Iṭappeṟavēṇumeṉṟum Aiyyaṉ maḻavarāyaṉ namakku co
ṉṉamaiyil Ipparamasvāmikaḷukku vaṭatalaic cempināṭṭuk kiḻaikkoṭumaḷurāṉa maturotaiyanallūr Araiyaṉ pūvaṉāṉa veṇāṭuṭai
yāṉ Araiyaṉ tirunāṭuṭaiyāṉāṉa nilakaṅkaraiyaṉ perāl kaṇṭa tirunāṭuṭaiyāṉ cantikku tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nimanta
ṅkaḷukkum veṇāṭuṭaiyāṉ piṟaṉta Uttiraṭṭāti nāḷ tirttham prasātippatāka kaṇṭa cittirai tirunāḷ 10 5cukku tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇ
ṭum nimantaṅkaḷukkum tirunāṭpaṭikkum peruṅkuḷamāṉa Uttamapāṇṭiyanallūril Iparamasvāmikaḷukku tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāy Iv
veṇāṭuṭaiyāṉukku kāṇiyāṉa nilam Añcu vailiyil Ittiruveḷḷaṟai niṉṟa Ātippirāṉ vaṇṭuvaraipperumāṉāṉa cuntarappāṇṭi
ya brahmātarāyaṉukku Ivveṇāṭuṭaiyāḷ kārāṇmai taṉmatāṉamākak kuṭutta nilam Araiyum ka nilam
nālaṟaiyum muṉṉuṭaiyārait tavirttu Ivvāṇṭu mutal kārāṇmai miyācci tevatāṉamāka Iṭ
ṭu variyilāreḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvariyum keḻviyum taraccoṉṉom kaikkoṇṭu Ippaṭi candrādityavarai cel
vatāka kallilum cempi(l)lum veṭṭivittukkoḷka Ivai Arumpoṟkūṟṟattupputupperuṅkuḷattā
ḻvāṉ Āṇṭapirāṉ Aḻakaṉāṉa Aḻakiyapāṇṭiya viḻupparaiyaṉ Eḻuttu § yāṇṭu 10 1 vatu nāḷ
4 100 9 10 4 Ivai Aṇṭanāṭṭu perumaṇalūr Araiyaṉ muṭivaḻaṅkum perumāḷāṉa vikkiramapāṇ
ṭiya Uttaramantiri Eḻuttu . Uḷvariyāṇṭu patiṉoṟāvatu nāḷ kārāṇmai(t) Ittevatāṉam Iṭṭapa
ṭikku Uḷvari tiruvaḻutivaḷanāṭṭu tirukkurukūṟ poliñcuniṉṟaruḷip paramasvāmikaḷukku vaṭatalaic ce
mpil nāṭṭuk kiḻaik koṭumaḷūrāṉa maturotaiyanallūṟ Araiyaṉ tirunāṭuṭai yāṉāṉa nilaka
ṅkaraiyaṉ perāl Araiyaṉ pūvaṉāṉa veṇāṭuṭaiyāṉ kaṇṭa tirunāṭuṭaiyāṉ cantikkum veṇā
ṭuṭaiyāṉa piṟanta Uttiraṭṭāti nāḷ tirttham prasātippatāka kaṇṭa cittirait tirunāḷ 10 5 kkum
tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nimantaṅkaḷukkum tirunāṭpaṭikkum patiṉoṉṟāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu
mutal kārāṇmait tevatāṉamākap peruṅkuḷamāṉa Uttamapāṇṭiyanallūril Ipparamasvāmikaḷukku
tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāy Ivveṇāṭuṭaiyāṉ kāṇiyāṉa rūpāy 5li nilam Añcu veliyil tiruveḷḷaṟai niṉṟa vāti
pirāṉ vaṇṭuvaraipperumāḷāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiya brahmātarāyaṉukku Ivveṇāṭuṭaiyāṉ kārāṇmaitāṉamāka kuṭu
tta 5 ¬ nilam Arainikki 5 10 4¬ nilam nālaraiyum muṉṉuṭaiyārai tavirttu Ivvāṇṭu mutal kārāṇmai tevatāṉa
māka Iṭṭamaikku Ivai puravari tiṉaikkaḷanāyakam vaṭaveḷḷaracaṉ pāṇṭiyavaḷanāṭṭu kūṟṟaṅkuṭaiyāṉ cirāḷaṉ paṭṭālakaṉāṉa
ppaḻantiparāyaṉeḻuttu Ivai puravari tiṉaikkaḷanāyakam vaṭavallattirukkai Iḷāṉkuṭiyāṉa Intirāvatāranallūr catiraṉ tiruvaṇaiaṭai
ttāṉāṉa villavataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vaṭatalai cempināṭṭu Āyakkuṭiyāṉa Aḻakiyapāṇṭiyanallūr civallavan Eṟu tiruuṭaiyā
ṉāṉa kāliṅkarājaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai puravaritiṉaikkaḷanāyakam miḻalaikkūṟṟattu naṭuviṟkūṟṟu ciparāntakanallūrvāṇiyaṅ
kuṭaiyāṉ Aḻakaṉ kecavaperumāḷāṉa ceḻiyataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kiḻvempu nāṭṭu taccaṉūr Araiyaṉ katirā
yiramuṭaiyāṉāṉa kaliṅkataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai miḻilaikkuṟṟattu naṭuviṟkuṟṟu maṅkalattu pūṉaiyūruṭai
coticāriyaṉāṉa cempiyarā[ja]ṉ Eḻuttu Ivai puravaritiṉaikkaḷanāyakam miḻalaikkuṟṟattu naṭuviṟ kuṟṟu ciparāntakanallū
r vāṇiyaṅkaṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ Aḻakaṉāṉa kacciyarājaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai muṟṟūṟṟū kuṟṟattu kallūrāṉa Ulakaḷantacoḻanallū
r kappalūruṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ Aḻakaṉāṉa muṉaitaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kiḷ vempaināṭṭu Irācavallapurattu Oruvar vaṇintāṉ (oruvāṟuṇarntāṉ ?)
Eṉakku nallaperumāḷāṉa tamiḻpallavaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai miḻalaikkuṟṟattuk kiḻkuṟṟut taccaṉūruṭaiyāṉ Aruḷāḷaṉ ceva
kattevaṉāṉa vāṇāyirājaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kiḻcempināṭṭu mālaṅkuṭi Araiyaṉ teyvaccilaiyāṉāṉa nuḷampādhirājaṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai vaṭatalaic cempināṭṭu kiḻaikkoṭumaḷūrrāṉa maturotaiyanallūr Araiyaṉ tirunāṭuṭaiyāṉa nilakaṅkaraiya
ṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 26.495 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
